mapper.select: SELECT id,login_name,login_password,shop_name,shop_content,address,contact_name,concat_tel,opening_hours,`status` FROM shop WHERE login_name=#{loginName} AND login_password=#{loginPassword}

SELECT id,login_name,login_password,shop_name,shop_content,address,contact_name,concat_tel,opening_hours,`status`,create_date FROM shop WHERE SUBSTRING(opening_hours,1,5) < #{time} AND SUBSTRING(opening_hours,7,5) > #{time} AND `status` = 1
